7_1_weakness.description: One sentence: structural weakness with evidence
7_1_weakness.evidence_source: Phase 1 metric or finding that identified this weakness

7_2_research.summary: What experts in the field recommend (cite sources above)

7_3_build.improvement_description: Specific change made to the system

7_4_metric.measurement_method: How was this measured? (script, manual count, log analysis, etc)
7_4_metric.significance: Does this metric change matter? (explain why in 1-2 sentences)

7_5_next_target.target_condition: What is the next improvement target condition? (Improvement Kata Q1)
7_5_next_target.expected_outcome: What is expected to happen when we reach this target? (measurable)

7_6_external_opportunity.vertical_or_horizontal_description: Vertical = go deeper in our domain. Horizontal = expand to adjacent domains.
7_6_external_opportunity.concrete_integration_plan: What are the MVP steps to integrate this? (numbered list)
7_6_external_opportunity.blockers: What would prevent us from integrating this? (dependencies, costs, complexity)

7_7_dependencies.what_is_needed: What does this agent need from others to continue?
7_7_dependencies.from_kai: Any Kai decisions, approvals, or strategic input?
7_7_dependencies.from_agents: Any help from other agents (Sam, Nel, Ra, etc)?

metadata.self_assessment: How confident is the agent in this cycle's findings and improvements? (high|medium|low with reasoning)
metadata.next_action: What is the very next step this agent should take?
